response_body_utf8: {"version":"6.9","hitCount":1,"request":{"queryString":"EXT_ID:42273173 AND SRC:MED","internalQuery":"EXT_ID:42273173 AND SRC:MED","resultType":"CORE","cursorMark":"*","pageSize":5,"sort":"","synonym":false},"resultList":{"result":[{"id":"42273173","source":"MED","pmid":"42273173","pmcid":"PMC13246412","fullTextIdList":{"fullTextId":["PMC13246412"]},"doi":"10.3389/frai.2026.1825132","title":"Adaptive Gating and Focal Debiasing for robust few-shot retinal disease classification.","authorString":"Muchuchuti S, Viriri S.","authorList":{"author":[{"fullName":"Muchuchuti S","firstName":"Stewart","lastName":"Muchuchuti","initials":"S","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Discipline of Computer Science, School of Agriculture and Science, University of KwaZulu-Natal, Durban, South Africa."}]}},{"fullName":"Viriri S","firstName":"Serestina","lastName":"Viriri","initials":"S","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Discipline of Computer Science, School of Agriculture and Science, University of KwaZulu-Natal, Durban, South Africa."}]}}]},"journalInfo":{"volume":"9","journalIssueId":4117457,"dateOfPublication":"2026 ","monthOfPublication":0,"yearOfPublication":2026,"printPublicationDate":"2026-01-01","journal":{"title":"Frontiers in artificial intelligence","medlineAbbreviation":"Front Artif Intell","isoabbreviation":"Front Artif Intell","nlmid":"101770551","essn":"2624-8212","issn":"2624-8212"}},"pubYear":"2026","pageInfo":"1825132","abstractText":"Hybrid attention few-shot models are promising for automated retinal disease classification in data-scarce settings, yet two issues persist: static fusion of global and local features, and weak performance on minority classes. We propose Adaptive Gating and Focal Debiasing (AGFD), which adds a Dynamic Attention Gating (DAG) module that learns input-specific weights for global and local attention branches, and replaces cross-entropy with focal loss to shift learning toward hard, underrepresented cases. On ODIR-5K under episodic evaluation, AGFD improves over a strong hybrid-attention baseline across all shot settings, reaching 78.7% accuracy and 76.9% macro-F1 in the 5-shot setting, and 83.2% accuracy at 10-shot. Minority classes benefit most, with +11-15 percentage-point F1 gains for Glaucoma, Cataract, Hypertension, and Other. Gate analysis shows higher global weighting for widespread conditions and higher local weighting for lesion-driven diseases. Coupling adaptive fusion with a debiased objective improves overall accuracy and reliability on underrepresented classes, a step toward more clinically useful screening.","affiliation":"Discipline of Computer Science, School of Agriculture and Science, University of KwaZulu-Natal, Durban, South Africa.","publicationStatus":"epublish","language":"eng","pubModel":"Electronic-eCollection","pubTypeList":{"pubType":["research-article","Journal Article"]},"keywordList":{"keyword":["Computer-aided Diagnosis","Retinal Imaging","Deep Learning","Class Imbalance","Few-shot Learning","Attention Mechanism","Focal Loss","Dynamic Gating"]},"fullTextUrlList":{"fullTextUrl":[{"availability":"Subscription required","availabilityCode":"S","documentStyle":"doi","site":"DOI","url":"https://doi.org/10.3389/frai.2026.1825132"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"html","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC13246412"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"pdf","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC13246412?pdf=render"}]},"isOpenAccess":"Y","inEPMC":"Y","inPMC":"Y","hasPDF":"Y","hasBook":"N","hasSuppl":"Y","citedByCount":0,"hasData":"Y","hasReferences":"N","hasTextMinedTerms":"Y","hasDbCrossReferences":"N","hasLabsLinks":"N","license":"cc by","hasEvaluations":"N","authMan":"N","epmcAuthMan":"N","nihAuthMan":"N","hasTMAccessionNumbers":"N","dateOfCompletion":"2026-06-11","dateOfCreation":"2026-06-11","firstIndexDate":"2026-06-11","fullTextReceivedDate":"2026-06-10","dateOfRevision":"2026-06-11","electronicPublicationDate":"2026-05-26","firstPublicationDate":"2026-05-26"}]}}
